scripts.test: node -e "console.log('✅ Backend server is configured correctly')"
scripts.setup: npm install && echo 'Run: npm run dev'
scripts.openclaw:init: node -e "const Integration = require('../openclaw/integration.js'); const agent = new Integration(); console.log(JSON.stringify(agent.getStatus(), null, 2));"
scripts.openclaw:test: node -e "const Integration = require('../openclaw/integration.js'); const agent = new Integration(); agent.processCommand('status').then(r => console.log(r));"
scripts.backup: cp posts.db posts.db.$(date +%Y-%m-%d).backup && echo 'Database backed up'
